अमृतसर 2. 2350(अ) 28.09.2010 छ瀄तीसगढ़/महारा瀠灩 सीमा - वैनगंगा पुल 3. 2839(अ) 20.12.2011 दुग榁 बाइपास क琉 समाि玅 - छ瀄तीसगढ़/महारा瀠灩 सीमा 4. 712(अ) 02.04.2012 जी़रकपुर - परवानू 5. 815(अ) 23.03.2009 गुड़गांव – कोटपुतली - जयपुर 6. 315(अ) 22.02.2012 琈द瀖ली - ह琇रयाणा सीमा - रोहतक 7. 509(अ) 11.03.2011 खलघाट - म瀇य 灹देश/महारा瀠灩 सीमा [फा. सं. भारारा灹ा/13013/सीओ/2016-17] दि楹ता दास, संयु榉त सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th January, 2018 S.O. 243(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highways) Rules, 1997, the Central Government authorized the Concessionaires of following BOT (Toll) Projects mentioned in Table-1 for levy and collection of user fee wherein the fee shall be rounded off to nearest rupee. Now, considering problem of change/shortage of coins and inconvenience to the users due to delays at Fee Plazas in transactions on account of change, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notifications of BOT (Toll) Projects mentioned in Table-1: “The fee shall be rounded off and levied in multiple of the nearest Rs. 5/- instead of nearest rupee.” TABLE-1 Sl. No. Details of Fee Notification Name of Highway Section S.O. No. Date 1 1592(E) 30.06.2009 Jalandhar-Amritsar 2 2350(E) 28.09.2010 CH/MH Border – Wainganga Bridge 3 2839(E) 20.12.2011 End of Durg Bypass – CH/MH Border 4 712(E) 02.04.2012 Zirakpur - Parwanoo 5 815(E) 23.03.2009 Gurgaon-Kotputli-Jaipur 6 315(E) 22.02.2012 Delhi-Haryana Border – Rohtak 7 509 (E) 11.03.2011 Khalghat-MP/Maharashtra Border [F. No. NHAI/13013/CO/2016-17] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy.
